poll.question: Ryan asks about the hunger, thirst, weight of staying. Who answers first?

options.label: Jade's truth
options.desc: She mirrors him: 'Can this actually last? Will you stay when it gets harder?'

options.label: Marcus's presence
options.desc: He moves closer, makes his answer physical—words aren't enough

options.label: Judy's doubt
options.desc: She breaks first: 'I'm terrified too. I said too much. What if you leave?'

in_play.label: Say what he feels
in_play.desc: Marcus speaks, trusting Jade enough to be fully seen.
